---
title: "Run EucsPhylogenomics"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# create output directories
outdir_clean_reads <- file.path(currentdir, "01_clean_reads")
outdir_assemblies <- file.path(currentdir, "02_assemblies")
outdir_extractions <- file.path(currentdir, "03_extractions")
outdir_extractions_all <- file.path(outdir_extractions, "all/")
outdir_alignments <- file.path(currentdir, "04_alignments")
outdir_final <- file.path(currentdir, "05_final")
sapply(c(outdir_clean_reads, outdir_assemblies, outdir_extractions, outdir_extractions_all, outdir_alignments, outdir_final), function(x) {
  if (!dir.exists(x)) { dir.create(x, recursive=T) }})

# open CAPTUS metadata
df_captus_sample_metadata <- data.table::fread(params$fn_captus_sample_metadata)
df_captus_target_metadata <- data.table::fread(params$fn_captus_sample_metadata)
ls_group <- unique(df_captus_target_metadata$group)
```

```{r run-captus}
# run CAPTUS to clean raw reads
f_run_captus_cleaning(params$exe_captus, params$dir_fastq, outdir_clean_reads, params$thread, params$redo) 

# run CAPTUS assemble and extraction for each group
for (group in ls_group) {
    # update group name
    group_no_ws <- gsub("\\s+", "", group)

    # output directory
    outdir_clean_reads_group <- file.path(outdir_clean_reads, group_no_ws)
    outdir_assemblies_group <- file.path(outdir_assemblies, group_no_ws)
    outdir_extractions_group <- file.path(outdir_extractions, group_no_ws)
    sapply(c(outdir_clean_reads_group, outdir_assemblies_group, outdir_extractions_group), function(x) {
        if (!dir.exists(x)) { dir.create(x, recursive=T) }})

    # move the CAPTUS output directories
    ls_group_sample <- df_captus_sample_metadata$sample[df_captus_sample_metadata$group==group]
    for (sample in ls_group_sample) {
        system(paste("mv",
                     paste0(outdir_clean_reads, "/", sample, "*"),
                     paste0(outdir_clean_reads_group, "/")))
    }

    # run CAPTUS assemble
    f_run_captus_assembly(params$exe_captus, outdir_clean_reads_group, outdir_assemblies_group, params$thread, params$redo)

    # run CAPTUS extraction
    f_run_captus_extraction(params$exe_captus,
                            df_captus_target_metadata$dir_target_loci, 
                            outdir_assemblies_group,
                            outdir_extractions_group,
                            params$thread,
                            params$redo)

    # move all CAPTUS extractions to one folder
    system(paste("mv",
                 paste0(outdir_assemblies_group, "/*__captus-ext"),
                 outdir_extractions_all))
}

# run CAPTUS align
f_run_captus_alignment(params$exe_captus, outdir_extractions_all, outdir_alignments, params$thread, params$redo)
```

```{r filter-alignment}
# create output directories
outdir_final_seq50 <- file.path(outdir_final, "01_seq50")
outdir_final_col50 <- file.path(outdir_final, "02_col50")
outdir_final_trimlabel <- file.path(outdir_final, "03_trimlabel")
outdir_final_phylogeny <- file.path(outdir_final, "04_phylogeny")
sapply(c(outdir_final_seq50, outdir_final_col50, outdir_final_trimlabel, outdir_final_phylogeny), function(x) {
  if (!dir.exists(x)) { dir.create(x, recursive=T) }})

# output files
fn_captus_summary <- file.path(currentdir, "captus_summary.tsv")
fn_concatenated <- file.path(outdir_final_phylogeny, "concatenated.out")
fn_partition <- file.path(outdir_final_phylogeny, "partitions.nex")
fn_concatenated_filtered <- file.path(outdir_final_phylogeny, "concatenated.fna")

# extract list of locus
ls_locus <- list.files(file.path(outdir_alignments, "03_trimmed", "05_naive", "04_misc_DNA", "01_matches"), recursive=F, full.names=F)
ls_locus <- gsub(".fna", "", ls_locus)

# iterate over locus
df_captus_label <- NULL

if (!file.exists(fn_captus_summary) || params$redo) {
    for (locus in ls_locus) {
        fn_input <- file.path(outdir_alignments, "03_trimmed", "05_naive", "04_misc_DNA", "01_matches", paste0(locus, ".fna"))
        fn_seq50 <- file.path(outdir_final_seq50, paste0(locus, ".fna"))
        fn_col50 <- file.path(outdir_final_col50, paste0(locus, ".fna"))
        fn_trimlabel <- file.path(outdir_final_trimlabel, paste0(locus, ".fna"))

        # filter locus alignment
        f_remove_seq(fn_input, fn_seq50, 0.5)
        f_remove_col(fn_seq50, fn_col50, 0.5)
        df_captus_label_locus <- f_trim_captus_label(fn_col50, locus, fn_trimlabel)

        # update data.frame
        df_captus_label <- rbind(df_captus_label, df_captus_label_locus)
    }

    data.table::fwrite(df_captus_label, file=fn_captus_summary, sep="\t", quote=F)
}

# concatenate locus alignments
f_amas_dna(input_regex=file.path(outdir_final_trimlabel, "*.fna"),
           fn_output_aln=fn_concatenated,
           fn_output_part=fn_partition,
           exe_amas=params$exe_amas)
f_unknown2gap(fn_concatenated, fn_concatenated_filtered)
```


```{r tree}
# output files
fn_fasttree_tre <- file.path(outdir_final_phylogeny, "fasttree.tre")
fn_iqtree_tre <- file.path(outdir_final_phylogeny, "iqtree.treefile")
fn_alltrees_tre <- file.path(outdir_final_phylogeny, "alltrees.tre")
fn_astral_tre <- file.path(outdir_final_phylogeny, "iqtree_qcf.tre")
fn_astral_log <- file.path(outdir_final_phylogeny, "iqtree_qcf.log")

# check if file exists
if (!file.exists(fn_fasttree_tre) || params$redo) {
    # infer FastTree tree
    f_fasttree(fn_fasta=fn_concatenated_filtered,
               fn_output=fn_fasttree_tre,
               exe_fasttree=params$exe_fasttree)
}

# refine the species tree using IQ-TREE2
f_iqtree2(fn_input=fn_concatenated_filtered,
          fn_tree=fn_fasttree_tre,
          fn_partition=fn_partition,
          prefix=paste0(outdir_final_phylogeny, "/iqtree"),
          thread=params$thread,
          is_redo=params$redo,
          exe_iqtree2=params$exe_iqtree)

# infer individual gene trees
nwcl <- makeCluster(params$thread)
registerDoSNOW(nwcl)

# create output directory
outdir_locus_tree <- file.path(outdir_final_phylogeny, "gene_tree")
if (!dir.exists(outdir_locus_tree)) {
    dir.create(outdir_locus_tree, recursive=T)
}

# iterate over loci
foreach (locus = ls_locus) %dopar% {
    prefix <- paste0(outdir_locus_tree, "/", locus)
    fn_input <- file.path(outdir_final_trimlabel, paste0(locus, ".fna"))

    f_iqtree2_singlethread(fn_input, prefix, params$redo, params$exe_iqtree)
}

stopCluster(nwcl)

# move all locus trees onto one file
system(paste("cat",
             paste0(outdir_locus_tree, "/*.treefile"),
             ">", fn_alltrees_tre))

# check if file exists
if (!file.exists(fn_astral_tre) || params$redo) {
    # calculate qCF using Astral4
    f_astral4(fn_input=fn_alltrees_tre,
              fn_tree=fn_iqtree_tre,
              fn_output=fn_astral_tre,
              fn_log=fn_astral_log,
              thread=params$thread,
              exe_astral=params$exe_astral4)
} 

# calculate sCF and gCF
f_calculate_cf(fn_all_trees=fn_alltrees_tre,
               fn_sp_tree=fn_astral_tre,
               dir_fasta=outdir_final_trimlabel,
               prefix=paste0(outdir_final_phylogeny, "/iqtree_concord"),
               thread=params$thread,
               is_redo=params$redo,
               exe_iqtree2=params$exe_iqtree)
```
